care.summary: Glossy heart-shaped spathes and dark green leaves; likes warmth, humidity, and even moisture.
care.light: Bright indirect; avoid harsh midday sun
care.water: Water when top inch dries; never waterlog
care.soil: Chunky aroid mix with orchid bark
care.fertilizer: Balanced dilute feed every 4–6 weeks in growth
tips: Wipe leaves to keep spathes showy
Use filtered water if tips brown
